name: workflow state contract commits array elements include a sha field per the contract
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","commits":[{"sha":"abc","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check commits 2>out.txt && grep -q 'commits_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
